name: IT Commerce
description: End-to-end hardware and software procurement platform covering lifecycle from vendor selection through configuration, licensing, and delivery — enabling IT buyers to consolidate multi-vendor spend into a single purchase order, reduce procurement cycle time by 40-60%, and shift from reactive spot-buying to planned technology refresh programs.
positioning: Germany's broadest IT procurement channel with 70+ vendor certifications and 44,000+ SKUs available next-day — competitors match on price, but cannot match the configuration depth and logistics density of Bechtle's 80+ local Systemhäuser.
